settings.title: Settings
settings.languageTooltip: {name} UI is available in Chinese. This setting also translates plugin text for those that support it.
settings.sleepTimeoutTooltip: This option controls how many minutes of inactivity will cause devices to enter sleep mode, where a value of 0 disables sleeping automatically.
settings.runInBackgroundTooltip: If this option is enabled, {name} will minimise to the tray and run in the background.
settings.startAtLoginTooltip: If this option is enabled, {name} will automatically start at login.
settings.startAtLoginFlatpak: If you used Flatpak to install {name}, this option may not function as intended.
settings.separateWinePrefixesTooltip: If this option is enabled, {name} will create a separate Wine prefix for each plugin that runs under Wine. Please note that each Wine prefix is quite large - around 300MB when initialised.
settings.developerModeTooltip: This option enables features that make plugin development and debugging easier. Additionally, this option exposes all file paths on your device on the local webserver to allow symbolic linking of plugins, so you should disable it if it is not in use.
settings.disableElgatoDiscoveryTooltip: This option disables discovery of Elgato devices so that they can be managed by other software.
settings.backupPrompt: You will be prompted to select a location to save the backup to. The config directory will be compressed and saved there. This may take a while if you have many plugins or profiles.
settings.backupSuccess: Successfully backed up the config directory.
settings.restorePrompt:
You will be prompted to select a location to restore the backup from. This may take a while if you have many plugins or profiles. The application will restart after the restoration is complete.

You may encounter issues if you attempt to restore a backup from a different operating system or architecture.

pluginManager.supportWarning: If you are experiencing issues with a plugin, please reach out on one of the {name} support channels before attempting to contact the plugin developer.
pluginManager.openSourcePluginsTooltip: Open-source plugins downloaded from the author's releases
pluginManager.elgatoArchiveTooltip: Plugins archived from the Elgato App Store (now replaced by the Elgato Marketplace)
pluginManager.loadingElgatoArchive: Loading Elgato App Store archive plugin list...
pluginManager.tactoTooltip: Turn your phone or keyboard into a control centre for your computer
pluginManager.installConfirm: It may take a while to install the plugin.
pluginManager.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove "{name}"?

profileManager.appProfilesHelp: If your application isn't listed, try switching to it and back again.
profileManager.defaultProfileHelp: The 'default profile' will activate when the focussed application has no profile associated with it.
profileManager.renameFailed: A profile with the ID "{id}" already exists.

deviceView.srDescription: Use arrow keys to navigate between keys. Moving to a key will display its property inspector.

noDevices.title: No devices detected
noDevices.checkConnection: Make sure your devices are connected properly and you have permission to access them.
noDevices.checkUdev: Ensure you have the correct udev subsystem rules installed.
noDevices.installPlugin: You may need to install a plugin that adds support for your device.

instanceEditor.clickToSelectImage: Click to select an image, or right-click to reset to the default image.

parentAction.dragHint: Drag a new action here or copy one with Control+C and paste with Control+V.

actionList.srNavigation: Use arrow keys to navigate between actions within a category.
